title: Chouchou Blocks the Villagers
description: On pages 8–11, Orange Town deals with the aftermath of Buggy’s defeat, while Luffy, Zoro, and Nami decide what they will carry away from the island.
scene: Buggy’s threat has been broken, but the town is still tense: the villagers, Mayor Boodle, Chouchou, and the Straw Hats all react to the damage left behind.

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: for their chief, for just one person...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No matter what excuse we give, they'll still be mad at us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They're running away through an alley!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, Shushu! Move out of the way, quickly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Why are you stop- ping us? Shushu!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hua... was getting pretty worried. Shanks to Shushu we barely got away.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why does it always end up this way?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who cares what they think... We did what we came to do!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, it's not quite like that

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WaH! It's cool. I envy you

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I stole it from a bunch of stupid pirates

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We have been waiting for you, thief!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We knew you'd come back if we stayed here

dialogue.speaker: Orange Town Villager
dialogue.text: Hehehehehehe! I never dreamed that we'd see this boat again in this very harbor after you stole it

summary: The part closes the Orange Town conflict by shifting from combat to consequences: treasure, forgiveness, pride, and the Straw Hats’ departure.
